dialogos.texto_en: We've arrived. This is it.
Wow...\nIt's already so beautiful,\neven though the sun isn't fully set yet.
Yes, the view will get even more beautiful.
As expected, it's been named 'Sunset Beach' for a reason.
Let's move to a better viewing spot now,\nso we don't miss the moment the sun sets.
Ah, right%p-2;――
Eeeep!
Woah!
You alright?
Sorry, I was lost in the sunset,\nand wasn't paying attention to where I was stepping.
...Then, should we do this?
Ah...
Is this okay?\nMaybe holding hands to avoid falling seems childish.
No...\nEven if you're not a child, you can sometimes risk falling.
I'll support you too, if you need it.
Sure, thank you.
(...Holding hands is so easy.\n And yet, I couldn't have imagined doing this on the first day.)
(No, it's not just easy.\n Our relationship has become something more.)
From here, the sunset is clearly visible.
Yeah...
(The slowly moving sun, the sky tinted with crimson.\n It seems like I can even hear the sound of the waves\n from further away than usual%p-2;――%p;)
The evening twilight is so enchanting, isn't it?
I didn't know it could be like this.\nEven though the night sky can be seen from anywhere,\nif you just look up at the right time, there it is.
Perhaps it's because the sun\nsinks down towards the horizon.
That's right. In our city,\nit's often hidden behind buildings and isn't visible.
Yes, I don't know what to say...
I knew it, but I didn't really know.\nThat the sun hides behind the earth like this.
However, it will rise up into the sky again tomorrow.\nIt's an event that repeats itself every day,\nand it's not a special one.
But%p-2;――
For us, it's a special view\nthat we were able to see because we came here.
Special, huh.
This sunset, and that stained glass.\nTo me, everything is something special.
Even for me, this journey has all been special.\nThe time spent with you,\nand spending it with everyone else.
Yes...\nAt first, things didn't go smoothly, but%p-2;――
I made a lot of memories with you\nand with everyone else,\nand it turned out to be the best trip.
Yeah.\nI'll never forget it. It's a trip\nthat will remain in my memory for a lifetime.
(Even when I become an adult,\n I'll remember this sunset\n and the sea I saw with Itsuki...)
...Uesugi-kun.
What is it?
I'm really glad I met you.
During this trip,\nbeing closer to you than ever before,\nI felt your presence even more deeply%p-2;――
Being able to be by your side,\nalone, makes me incredibly happy.
Itsuki...
...Futaro.
...Can I kiss you?
Yes...
Nnn...
(What is this feeling?\n It's like my emotions\n are connected with Itsuki's right now.)
(It's different from when we were at Umikaji Terrace.\n It feels like our feelings have become one%p-2;――%p;)
...Itsuki?
WOAH!
Itsuki? What's wrong?
When I looked into your eyes earlier,\nI wanted you to kiss me...
But, as if my feelings\nwere conveyed to you, you said it first!
Same here. I feel like our feelings are connected.
It's like a miracle.
We saw the same scenery, and we feel the same way...\nEven without words, we can share our feelings.
I finally understand.\nThis feeling is love, isn't it.
I made mistakes and took detours,\nbut these feelings%p-2;――%p; are truly mine.
I love you.\nI've fallen in love with you.
So, let's stay together...\nforever, Futaro.
Yes. Let's be together forever, Itsuki.
